languages.text: "Я не желаю противостояния с тобой. Напротив, предлагаю объединить усилия".
"I do not seek a confrontation with you. On the contrary, I propose we join forces."
languages.original_text: "Я не желаю противостояния с тобой. Напротив, предлагаю объединить усилия".

traits.locale_text: "I do not seek a confrontation with you. On the contrary, I propose we join forces."
"I do not seek a confrontation with you. On the contrary, I propose we join forces."
"I do not seek a confrontation with you. On the contrary, I propose we join forces."

languages.text: «No pretendo enemistarme con usted. Al contrario: propongo que unamos nuestras fuerzas».
languages.original_text: "I do not seek a confrontation with you. On the contrary, I propose we join forces."

traits.locale_text: «No pretendo enemistarme con usted. Al contrario: propongo que unamos nuestras fuerzas».

languages.text: “我不想与你为敌。恰恰相反，我提议我们联手。”
languages.original_text: "I do not seek a confrontation with you. On the contrary, I propose we join forces."

traits.locale_text: “我不想与你为敌。恰恰相反，我提议我们联手。”

languages.text: « Je ne cherche pas la confrontation. Au contraire, je vous propose d'unir nos forces. »
languages.original_text: "I do not seek a confrontation with you. On the contrary, I propose we join forces."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne cherche pas la confrontation. Au contraire, je vous propose d'unir nos forces. »

languages.text: "Seninle çatışmak niyetinde değilim. Aksine güçlerimizi birleştirmeyi teklif ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "I do not seek a confrontation with you. On the contrary, I propose we join forces."

traits.locale_text: "Seninle çatışmak niyetinde değilim. Aksine güçlerimizi birleştirmeyi teklif ediyorum."

languages.text: "Ich suche keine Konfrontation mit Euch. Im Gegenteil, ich schlage vor, wir arbeiten zusammen."
languages.original_text: "I do not seek a confrontation with you. On the contrary, I propose we join forces."

traits.locale_text: "Ich suche keine Konfrontation mit Euch. Im Gegenteil, ich schlage vor, wir arbeiten zusammen."

languages.text: 「君と対決するつもりはない。むしろ、力を合わせていくことを提案する。」
languages.original_text: "I do not seek a confrontation with you. On the contrary, I propose we join forces."

traits.locale_text: 「君と対決するつもりはない。むしろ、力を合わせていくことを提案する。」
